title: game_get_visibility – input
description: Returns explored/visible bit masks for one player. Bounding box is optional but all four fields (x, y, width, height) must be provided together if any one is given.

x.description: Left column of the bounding box (0-based). Must be provided together with y, width, height.

y.description: Top row of the bounding box (0-based).

width.description: Number of columns in the bounding box.

height.description: Number of rows in the bounding box.
